ibis.orig: There is no consensus on the causes of long covid or on the best treatments.
ibis.text: What are the causes of long covid and what are the best treatments?

ibis.orig: persistent symptoms were associated with female sex, higher deprivation, pre-existing health conditions, more severe acute Covid-19 symptoms and being infected with the original “Wild-type” SARS-Cov-2 variant.
ibis.text: Persistent symptoms of long covid are associated with female sex, higher deprivation, pre-existing health conditions, more severe acute Covid-19 symptoms and infection with the original “Wild-type” SARS-Cov-2 variant.

ibis.orig: prolonged symptoms after Covid-19 were associated with female sex, white ethnicity, poor pre-pandemic health, obesity and asthma.
ibis.text: Prolonged symptoms after Covid-19 are associated with female sex, white ethnicity, poor pre-pandemic health, obesity and asthma.

ibis.orig: long covid was associated with female sex, non-white ethnicity, obesity and pre-existing medical conditions, including anxiety and type 2 diabetes.
ibis.text: Long covid is associated with female sex, non-white ethnicity, obesity and pre-existing medical conditions, including anxiety and type 2 diabetes.

ibis.orig: highlighting the importance of multidisciplinary care and involving people with lived experience in the design and evaluation of long covid services.
ibis.text: Multidisciplinary care and the involvement of people with lived experience are important in the design and evaluation of long covid services.

ibis.orig: REACT Long COVID: this study is gathering data using surveys and interviews to help researchers understand experiences of long covid and why some people are affected by longer-term symptoms.
ibis.text: The REACT Long COVID study uses surveys and interviews to understand experiences and why some people are affected by longer-term symptoms.

ibis.orig: Convalescence: this study is using a variety of research methods to explore definitions of long covid, risk factors and consequences of the condition
ibis.text: The Convalescence study uses various research methods to explore definitions, risk factors, and consequences of long covid.

ibis.orig: STIMULATE-ICP: this study is using a range of research methods to assess integrated care pathways for patients with long covid and to test common medicines to see if they are effective in treating long covid.
ibis.text: The STIMULATE-ICP study assesses integrated care pathways and tests the effectiveness of common medicines for treating long covid.

ibis.orig: LOCOMOTION: this study used a range of research methods to examine existing models of care for patients with long covid to develop a ‘gold standard’ for care in different settings.
ibis.text: The LOCOMOTION study examined existing models of care to develop a gold standard for long covid care in different settings.
